meta.title: Langflow Workflow Builder
meta.description: Execute visual flows built in Langflow via API

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Trigger Langflow flow via webhook. Expected JSON: { flowId, inputs?, stream?, flowName?, logLevel?, tweaks?, refresh_langchain_cache? }. API key via X-API-Key header only (no body fallback). Set LANGFLOW_API_KEY env var to enable auth.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: SECURITY: Input validation with timing-safe API key auth (header only, no body fallback, early length check prevents null-byte attacks). Validates flowId format (no path traversal), inputs/tweaks structure, and optional parameters.

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.notes: Branch based on validation result. True branch continues to Langflow Request, false branch goes to Error Response.

nodes.name: Error Response
nodes.notes: Return HTTP 400 for validation errors. Configured as response node for webhook responseMode.

nodes.name: Langflow Request
nodes.notes: Forward validated inputs to Langflow API. 5 min timeout, 100MB max response.

nodes.name: Success Response
nodes.notes: Return Langflow response. Configured as response node for webhook responseMode.
